timeout.meaning: request or tool took too long

tool_unavailable.meaning: wrapper or runtime tool was missing

navigation_failed.meaning: browser or desktop navigation did not complete

bot_detection_triggered.meaning: Site detected automation (e.g. Google Abuse, Cloudflare)
bot_detection_triggered.recommended_response: Use Stealth Mode, human typing delays, and avoid deep URL navigation.

ui_coordinate_drift.meaning: Clicks failing due to static X,Y coordinates on dynamic UI
ui_coordinate_drift.recommended_response: Switch to DOM/Playwright automation or use real-time Vision to re-calibrate.

google_deep_link_block.root_cause: Navigating directly to search results URL instead of home page
google_deep_link_block.fix: Navigate to home, type query with delay, and click search button

edge_profiling_lock.signature: Target page, context or browser has been closed
edge_profiling_lock.root_cause: Edge already open blocking the User Data profile directory
edge_profiling_lock.fix: Kill all msedge.exe processes before launching persistent context
